name: lineum-core-monorepo
description: Monorepo root for Lineum Core, Portal, and Lab

scripts.build: echo '--- MONOREPO SYNC & BUILD ---' && (mkdir -p portal/src/lib/data/whitepapers portal/src/lib/data/source || true) && (cp -rv whitepapers/. portal/src/lib/data/whitepapers/ || echo 'No whitepapers') && (cp -rv source/. portal/src/lib/data/source/ || echo 'No source') && cd portal && npm install && npm run build
scripts.test: cd portal && npm test && cd ../lab && npm test
